hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=j.tool_input?.command||'';if(!/^git\s+push/.test(cmd)){console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true}));return}const fs=require('fs');const flag='.push-approved';if(fs.existsSync(flag)){fs.unlinkSync(flag);console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true}))}else{console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'⛔ git push 被攔截！請先透過 Telegram 或 CLI 取得 Key User 同意，收到同意後建立 .push-approved 旗標檔案再重試。'}))}})"
hooks.statusMessage: 檢查 git push 權限...
檢查 tasks.md 勾選狀態...

hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q 'memory/' && npm run memory:export --silent || true
